name: Sharp Racing
description: Pit-wall energy. Condensed display type, near-square corners, crisp tight shadows, a punchy hard-angle gradient. The first fully-defined feeling and the reference every later feeling is authored against.
_note: A FEELING is form only (type, shape, depth, gradient character) — NEVER color. It composes with any color to form a THEME (see _themes.json). All values map to a FileMaker layout-object property per FILEMAKER-CAPABILITIES.md.

fmpMapping.font: Chakra Petch (display) / Inter (body) — substitute installed equivalents; record the substitution here
fmpMapping.gradient: linear, 100 degrees, 2 stops (+12% lift top / -16% drop bottom off the accent)
fmpMapping.innerShadow: inset offset y2, blur4, opacity 50% (pressed / focus inset)
